segments.text: Now the angel who talked with me came back and wakened me, as a man who is wakened out of his sleep.
And he said to me,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: So I said,
I am looking, and there is a lampstand of solid gold with a bowl on top of it, and on the stand seven lamps with seven pipes to the seven lamps.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: Two olive trees are by it, one at the right of the bowl and the other at its left.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: So I answered and spoke to the angel who talked with me, saying,
What are these, my lord?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: Then the angel who talked with me answered and said to me,
Do you not know what these are?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: And I said,
No, my lord.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: So he answered and said to me:
This is the word of the Lord to Zerubbabel: 'Not by might nor by power, but by My Spirit,'
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Says the Lord of hosts.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Who are you, O great mountain? Before Zerubbabel you shall become a plain! And he shall bring forth the capstone With shouts of 'Grace, grace to it!'
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Moreover the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
The hands of Zerubbabel Have laid the foundation of this temple; His hands shall also finish it. Then you will know That the Lord of hosts has sent Me to you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For who has despised the day of small things? For these seven rejoice to see The plumb line in the hand of Zerubbabel. They are the eyes of the Lord, Which scan to and fro throughout the whole earth.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then I answered and said to him,
What are these two olive trees—at the right of the lampstand and at its left?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: And I further answered and said to him,
What are these two olive branches that drip into the receptacles of the two gold pipes from which the golden oil drains?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: Then he answered me and said,
Do you not know what these are?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: And I said,
No, my lord.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: So he said,
These are the two anointed ones, who stand beside the Lord of the whole earth.
segments.speaker: Angel
